auth.bootstrap_explain: No users exist yet. The first account will be granted master privileges and can invite everyone else.
auth.bootstrap_done: Bootstrap already completed. Ask a master to create an account for you.
auth.register_hint: Create your account. You can start your own campaigns or accept invitations to join others.
auth.invite_only: Accounts are open — register to start or join a campaign.
auth.invite_explain: Create an account for another player. They will receive no email — give them the email + password manually.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Your chronicles and chronicles yet to begin.
campaigns.hint_master: Forge a new chronicle by striking the brass add button.
campaigns.hint_player: Ask your master to enlist you in a campaign.

members.title: Campaign members
members.explain: Invite existing users into this campaign and assign them a role.
members.remove_confirm: Remove this member from the campaign?

settings.title: Campaign Settings
settings.delete_confirm: Permanently delete this campaign and all its data?

character.title: Characters
character.name: Name
character.empty: No characters yet — forge your first.
character.limit_reached: Character limit reached. Ask the master to raise it.
character.aura_of_protection: Aura of Protection ({{bonus}} to all saves)
character.equipment_empty: Pack's empty. Add some gear below.
character.classes_milestone_hint: Milestone leveling — the GM levels you up manually.
character.seed_none: No SRD features found for this class/subclass.
character.feats_hint: Choose feats instead of ASI at levels 4, 8, 12, 16, 19 (Fighter also 6 & 14, Rogue also 10)
character.spell_too_high: Not on your class list or above your class level's access
character.class_remove_confirm: Remove this class entry? Associated features will be pruned.
character.sync_level_total_hint: Auto-sum from class levels (PHB multiclass prof bonus = 2+⌊(total-1)/4⌋)
character.save_bonus_hint: Conditional save bonus from spells (Bless, Aura of Protection, etc.)
character.use_suggested_armor_hint: Set armor type based on your class (PHB unarmored defense)
character.short_rest_confirm: Short rest? Class-specific resources refresh; you may also spend hit dice manually to heal.
character.long_rest_confirm: Long rest? HP → max, half hit dice regained, all slots & resources refreshed.
character.cannot_learn_slot: Cannot learn {{name}}: your highest spell-slot level is {{level}}.
character.cannot_learn_class: Cannot learn {{name}}: not on your class list or above your class level's access.

onboarding.level_hint: Set your level to match your class. Click the Lv badge.
onboarding.race_hint: Choose your character's race from the dropdown.
onboarding.class_hint: Go to the Features tab and add your first class.
onboarding.subclass_hint: Pick a subclass for your class in the Features tab.
onboarding.abilities_hint: Go to the Combat tab and set your ability scores (STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA).
onboarding.skills_hint: Mark your skill proficiencies in the Combat tab.
onboarding.hp_hint: Go to Vitals and set your max HP according to your class hit die.
onboarding.ac_hint: Set your Armor Class in the Combat tab or choose an armor type.
onboarding.spells_hint: Your class can cast spells! Go to the Magic tab to learn some.
onboarding.equipment_hint: Go to Equipment and add your starting gear.
onboarding.background_hint: Finish up by writing your backstory in the Background tab.

recap.title: Session History
recap.subtitle: The chronicle of sessions past
recap.body_ph: Recap (blank lines = paragraphs, # Title for sections)

map.title: Atlas
map.subtitle: Charts of realms known and unknown
map.click_hint: Click anywhere on the parchment to drop a pin.
map.image_hint: Upload a raster chart. Players see it too.
map.pin_delete_confirm: Strike this pin from the chart?
map.empty: The atlas is empty. Draft your first chart.
map.no_chart_yet: No chart loaded — upload a map above.
map.delete_map_confirm: Delete the chart '{{name}}' and all its pins?

initiative.title: War Council
initiative.subtitle: Order of battle & the turn of the hourglass
initiative.delete_confirm: Permanently delete the encounter "{{name}}" and all its combatants?
initiative.empty: No encounters yet. Ring the war bell.
initiative.remove_combatant_confirm: Remove this combatant from the encounter?
initiative.end_encounter_confirm: End the encounter "{{name}}"? Combatants remain but no further actions are tracked.
initiative.place_all_tokens_confirm: Place all unplaced tokens at the center of the map?
initiative.remove_token_confirm: Remove this token from the map?
initiative.clear_map_confirm: Remove the battle map from this encounter?
initiative.map_image_hint: Upload a raster map; tokens snap on top.
initiative.cantrip_auto_scale_hint: Cantrip will auto-scale ×{{mult}} on the server at caster level {{level}}
initiative.label_select_targets_parsed: Select a target for parsed attacks
initiative.label_shield_still_lands: Hit still lands (+5 AC applied for rest of round)
initiative.label_no_pending_hit: No pending hit this round — Shield requires being hit first
initiative.label_no_spell_being_cast: No spell being cast — Counterspell requires intercepting an active cast
initiative.map_drag_hint: Drag your token to move. Master can move any token.
initiative.map_master_drag_hint: Drag any token to move it. Players may move only their own.
initiative.effect_apply_spell_confirm: Apply the selected spell effect to {{target}}?
initiative.effect_remove_confirm: Remove effect "{{name}}" from {{target}}? This may break concentration.
initiative.err_select_parsed_target: Select a target for parsed attacks
initiative.title_disengage_ba: Cunning Action: Disengage as bonus action
initiative.title_dash_ba: Cunning Action: Dash as bonus action
initiative.title_hide_ba: Cunning Action: Hide as bonus action
initiative.title_help: Give ally advantage on next attack
initiative.title_lay_on_hands: Lay on Hands: heal from pool (select target first)
initiative.title_reckless: Reckless Attack (Barbarian): advantage, enemies have advantage vs you
initiative.title_skip_ammo: Don't consume ammunition for this attack
initiative.title_spell_attack: Use spell attack roll instead of saving throw (e.g. Eldritch Blast, Fire Bolt)
initiative.title_parse_multiattack: Parse NPC multiattack description into attack rows
initiative.title_zone_fog: Fog of war (click to place fog)
initiative.msg_react_shield_prompt: You were hit! Use Shield reaction?

chat.subtitle: Campaign chatter & private whispers

news.subtitle: Campaign news & dispatches

factions.subtitle: Factions, orders & guilds of the realm

factions.empty: No banners have been raised. The realm awaits its factions.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.explain: Campaign masters have invited you to join their chronicles.

users.title: Manage users
users.explain: Promote, reset passwords or remove accounts. Campaign membership lives inside each campaign.
users.reset_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
users.delete_confirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? Their characters will be removed too.

dice.title: Dice Tower
dice.subtitle: Fate is a matter of numbers
dice.clear_confirm: Clear all dice rolls for this campaign? This cannot be undone.
dice.tray_empty: Click a die to add it to the tray.
dice.custom_overrides_hint: Custom expression takes precedence over the tray and modifier.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.delete_user_confirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? All their characters will be removed too.
admin.delete_campaign_confirm: Permanently delete campaign "{{name}}" and all its data?
admin.backup_desc: Export a complete snapshot of the database or restore from a previous backup.
admin.download_backup_desc: Download a JSON file containing all database tables. This is your complete app backup.
admin.restore_backup_desc: WARNING: This will replace ALL current data with the backup file contents. This cannot be undone.
admin.restore_confirm: WARNING: This will DELETE all current data and replace it with the backup. Continue?
